textByHashes.a19319f75bdc1e106838b5f475afc13f04cb7976: Do you want to buy any fine silks?
textByHashes.d5f87462279168f0a5506600e83d87a16ec96408: Can't say as I've seen him... I'm sure if he's been to Al Kharid recently someone around here will have though.
textByHashes.b7be274b2353f858d7a9cfee00af619edcd71901: 2 gp and that's as low as I'll go.
textByHashes.741bbe958ab3d87101ab0e1d985318786cead366: I'm not selling it for any less. You'll probably go and sell it in Varrock for a profit, anyway.
textByHashes.4405e675f0704eb3ae409a217237db355906387e: Well, come back when you do have some money!
textByHashes.5daf944071e755bc0c3a37b2162da9c1b862501e: Okay, but that's the best price you're going to get.
